query:
ALTER TABLE h_material_inspections 
ADD COLUMN appearance VARCHAR(200),
ADD COLUMN odor VARCHAR(200),
ADD COLUMN color VARCHAR(100),
ADD COLUMN temperature DECIMAL(5,2),
ADD COLUMN result ENUM('pass', 'fail', 'conditional');
